definitions: A board with a corrugated surface, used for washing clothes by hand.
A road surface that has developed a series of ripples or corrugations, making for a bumpy ride.
A set of abdominal muscles that are well-defined and visible, resembling the ridges of a washboard.
examples: She scrubbed the clothes on the washboard.
The car bounced over the washboard road.
He worked hard to get a washboard stomach.
